data.title: Emera’s 2024 Financial Report: Strong Utility Performance and Strategic Growth Plans
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Emera ( (TSE:EMA) ) has provided an update.

Emera reported a successful 2024 financial year, with a 33% increase in quarterly adjusted EPS to $0.84, attributed to strong performance across its regulated utilities. Despite a decline in reported EPS due to various charges, the company executed its largest annual capital plan of $3.2 billion, driving a 7% rate base growth. The completion of Tampa Electric’s rate case is expected to significantly boost revenues in the coming years. Emera is strategically positioned to capitalize on organic growth opportunities, particularly in Florida, with a focus on a $20 billion capital plan over five years aimed at improving reliability, grid modernization, and infrastructure expansion.

More about Emera

Emera is a company operating in the energy sector, primarily focusing on regulated utilities. It is engaged in providing electricity and natural gas services, with a significant market presence in Florida and other regions.

YTD Price Performance: 7.83%

Average Trading Volume: 65,257

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $11.69B

An update from Celsius Holdings ( (CELH) ) is now available.

On February 21, 2025, Celsius Holdings presented at the Consumer Analyst Group of New York Conference, highlighting its growth strategy and innovative capabilities in the functional beverage sector. The company, which is known for its strong cash generation and market disruption, anticipates accelerated growth through its pending acquisition of Alani Nutrition, further positioning itself as a leader in the expanding market.

More about Celsius Holdings

Celsius Holdings, Inc. operates in the functional beverage industry, focusing on products designed to enhance metabolism and burn body fat in conjunction with moderate fitness activities. The company offers a portfolio of premium, disruptive brands in the ready-to-drink (RTD) energy category.

data.title: UOB’s Sydney Branch to Issue A$2 Billion in Senior Unsecured Notes
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from UOB ( (SG:U11) ) is now available.

United Overseas Bank Limited’s Sydney Branch is set to issue A$2 billion in Floating Rate Senior Unsecured Notes due 2028 under its US$30 billion Global Medium Term Note Programme. This strategic move, managed by a consortium of leading banks, aims to enhance UOB’s market presence and financial flexibility, attracting investors with the notes’ strong credit ratings of Aa1 by Moody’s, and AA- by both Standard & Poor’s and Fitch Ratings.

More about UOB

United Overseas Bank Limited (UOB) is a major banking institution headquartered in Singapore, with operations across various countries including Australia, China, and the United Kingdom. UOB offers a range of financial services including personal financial services, private banking, trust services, commercial and corporate banking, and transaction banking.

Flutter Entertainment PLC ( (FLUT) ) just unveiled an update.

Flutter Entertainment PLC announced the acquisition and cancellation of its own ordinary shares as part of a larger share buyback program, initially disclosed in 2024. This initiative, involving the redemption of shares through Goldman Sachs & Co. Rosenbauer International AG announced a significant change in its major holdings, with PiMa Beteiligungsverwaltung GmbH crossing a threshold to hold 32.68% of voting rights through financial instruments. data.title: Asiatic Group Clarifies Financial Statement Error and Legal Proceedings
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Asiatic Group (Holdings) Ltd. ( (SG:5CR) ) has provided an announcement.

Asiatic Group (Holdings) Limited has issued a clarification regarding an inadvertent error in its recent financial results announcement. The error pertains to a note on commitments and contingencies involving a legal claim with a joint venture partner, Royal Group Phnom Penh SEZ Plc. The company has stated that confidentiality obligations limit the disclosure of information related to ongoing arbitration, and updates will be provided to shareholders as necessary. Proceedings in the Singapore Court related to this arbitration have been discontinued.

More about Asiatic Group (Holdings) Ltd.

data.title: dynaCERT Closes $5M Equity Offering to Boost HydraGEN™ Sales
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

dynaCERT ( (TSE:DYA) ) has issued an announcement.

dynaCERT Inc. has successfully closed a $5,000,000 non-brokered equity offering, issuing 33,333,333 units comprising common shares and purchase warrants. The proceeds are intended to finance the global sales of their HydraGEN™ technology to sectors such as mining, oil & gas, and transportation, as well as for working capital and general corporate purposes. This strategic move supports dynaCERT’s positioning within the growing hydrogen economy and bolsters its market presence in carbon emission reduction solutions.

More about dynaCERT

dynaCERT Inc. operates in the carbon emission reduction technology industry, with a focus on manufacturing and distributing technologies such as HydraGEN™ and HydraLytica™ Telematics. These products are designed to enhance fuel efficiency and lower carbon emissions for diesel engines used across various sectors, including transportation, mining, and power generation.
